writer psychological journal pondered what makes humans distinct from beasts.
After discarding several possibilities-tool usage, language, ability think-the author concluded that humans seem only creatures care about what makes them distinct.
surface, outstanding trait humanity culture.
everyone agrees.
Some claim beasts have cultures: chimpanzees "harvest" termites with "tool"-a stripped tree branch wrought their hands; termites cultivate mushrooms consumption; birds create species-specific nests; whales sing.
such simple, largely instinctive practices (which neither change improve over time) hardly compare with humankind's achievements.
Beasts haven't arts technologies, scientific institutes historical archives, philosophers physicians.
Apparently culture distinguishing mark humankind.
what makes humans creatures culture?
every recorded human society-however primitive-indulged level culture beyond anything beasts might produce?
Whence this penchant culture?
Scripture teaches that humanity's attachment culture derives from sources.
First image God.
Humans aren't like beasts; we've been created image likeness 1:26-28).
have spiritual essence, being made conscious communion with Creator.
Himself being culture.
communes within Himself triune being 1:26; 17:5); fashioned universe great wonder diversity 1:1; 1:1-3); continues sustain that universe exhaustive detail (Col 1:17; 1:3).
shouldn't surprise that creature made likeness such would drawn toward cultural activities well.
Second, humans have mandate culture, which, along with other works God's law, written every human heart 2:14-15).
created people exercise dominion over other creatures 1:26-30)-the "cultural mandate."
Rather than giving license tyranny plunder, intends that humans exercise kind responsible stewardship that allows creatures realize full potential God's goodness, beauty, truth flourish.
process carrying this mandate, people create culture-language communication; families love nurture; agriculture sustenance; resource development tools pleasures; governments social order; procedures, protocols, practices; things useful things beautiful-all part in-built, God-given drive order world develop beauty potential environment.
Humans made employ hearts, minds, hands creation, maintenance, propagation those artifacts, institutions, conventions which define, sustain, enrich lives.
Culture rich means bringing honor glory God, Himself knew providing specific glorious design tabernacle temple; psalmists showed their skillful poetry song; Solomon demonstrated government public works astonishment world; Jesus showed through powerful storytelling.
(hospitals, universities, musical notation); signal achievements (the music Bach, paintings Rembrandt, poetry Hopkins); everyday delights (hymns, books, inspiring stories).
Such artifacts, institutions, conventions-the stuff culture-are fruit patient, deliberate labors faithful believers who, understanding their duty image bearers God, submitting their Lord's cultural mandate, point rest follow obediently path culture God's glory.
Does Scripture call engage culture?
certainly does.
ignore Scripture-the most significant cultural artifact human history?
God's image bearers, ignore calling take every thought captive offer that have God's service glory 10:3-5; 12:1-2)?
